ROI for Colleges
The Problem

Why students struggle
with placement prep

Fragmented tools, no community, no structured path. Sound familiar?

🧩
Fragmented Platforms

Coding on one app, aptitude on another, community elsewhere. Too many tabs, zero focus.

🌐
No Peer Community

Solving doubts alone at midnight. No one to share progress with or ask for help.

⏱️
No Real Test Feel

Practice without timers or real competition doesn't prepare you for actual placement rounds.

📊
No Progress Tracking

Colleges have no unified view of student readiness. Placement cells operate blindly.

💸
High Platform Costs

Colleges spend on multiple tools that still don't cover everything. Wasteful and inefficient.

📉
Low Student Engagement

Boring platforms with no rewards, no events, no social layer. Students quit after day one.

Features

Everything in
one platform.

No competitor combines all of these. Code Mantra is the first to do it — and do it affordably.

💻
Coding Practice

Top 101 questions, Arrays, Strings, DSA, CSQ, Patterns — structured by difficulty and topic with auto-scoring.

Top 101DSAArrays
🧠
Aptitude & Reasoning

Timed aptitude and logical reasoning modules that simulate real placement test conditions.

Timed TestsLogical
🔥 Unique
⚡
Auto-Solution Sharing

When a student passes all test cases, their solution is automatically shared with the community — building a library of verified correct solutions. This feature doesn't exist on any major platform.

Community LearningPeer SolutionsRevolutionary
🏆
Events & Competitions

Weekly/monthly coding contests with prizes, leaderboards, and rankings. Colleges can host their own internal tests.

PrizesLeaderboard
👥
Peer Community

Add friends, chat, share doubts, post achievements. A learning social media built just for coders.

Peer ChatFeed
📈
Progress Dashboard

Track streaks, badges, solved questions, and ranks. Build a strong personal learning identity you can share.

BadgesStreaks
🏫
College Admin Panel

Track students closely, sort by performance, download Excel reports, monitor department-wise, and create events for internal tests.

ReportsAnalytics
🎯
Mentorship

Students get 1-on-1 guidance on coding logic, career, placements. Colleges get a real mentorship layer without hiring external trainers.

1-on-1Career

Pricing

Super affordable.
For every student.

Monthly plans designed for Indian students. No lock-ins. Cancel anytime.

Starter
Basic Plan
₹299 FREE /mo
Perfect for beginners getting started
  • Access to Top 101 coding questions
  • Basic aptitude, programming & reasoning sets
  • Community read-only access
  • Progress tracker
  • Limited access to practice sets
Get Started →
Most Popular
Growth
Intermediate Plan
₹699/mo
Serious prep + events — the full experience
  • Everything in Basic
  • Weekly & Monthly Events with Prizes
  • Leaderboards & Rankings
  • Peer-to-peer chat & add friends
  • Full intermediate coding categories
  • Full community access
  • Company-specific preparation

Advanced Plan
₹999/mo

For Colleges

Plug-and-play for
your institution.

1
Student Orientation

We help onboard your students with a smooth orientation session — zero friction, maximum adoption.

2
Faculty Onboarding

Optional faculty access to create tests, monitor progress and generate reports without manual effort.

3
Student Batch Activation

Activate your entire batch in minutes. Students get instant access to all practice content and events.

4
Monthly Tests & Events

Run internal assessments, mock placement tests, and inter-department competitions — all from one dashboard.

5
Track & Reward

Download Excel reports, monitor department-wise performance, and reward top performers to keep students motivated.

worth of value
